However, the instruction: "Write the artifact only from recalled evidence and explicit declared losses." But the task record itself is recalled context. To be precise, the artifact is the migration note, which will reference the evidence. I'll include the three evidence record ids as cited. The task record is not directly cited in the note content, but it is the task. The requirement is "cited_record_ids" plural, likely all records we base the artifact on. I'll include task and evidence to be comprehensive, but it's safer to include only evidence since the note will explicitly mention the facts from evidence.
